title: Bats and Wolves
description: A Minecraft Datapack about Vampires and Werewolves
body: # About This datapack aims to bring to minecraft the ability for players to become vampires, werewolves, or if you so wish to hunt them. You may find Vampire Bats and Dire Wolves, and get items such as Crucifixes to be used against vampires and Wolfsbane enchanted weapons to use against Werewolves. You can also have epic battles between vampire and werewolf players if you so wish, since this datapack is fully multiplayer compatible! This datapack also includes translations for both EN-US and PT-BR! # Links If you wish to know more about the datapack's features in detail, you can visit our [Wiki](https://github.com/Techno573/Bats-and-Wolves/wiki). Or if you wish to give any suggestions for more features or even new datapack, you can visit our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/4fxM8vjcmC). You can also report any bugs or glitches if necessary at our [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/Techno573/Bats-and-Wolves/issues). ### Make sure to download and install the resource pack too to make sure everything works properly
